ddls:
CREATE TABLE "npo_registrations" (
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number assigned to the NPO */,
  "npo_name" TEXT /* Name of the non-profit organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the NPO */,
  "status" TEXT /* Registration status (e.g., Registered, Suspended, Canceled) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the NPO was registered */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the NPO */,
  "npo_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the NPO type */,
  "npo_objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the NPO objective */,
  "legal_structure" TEXT /* Legal structure of the NPO (e.g., Trust, Company) */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Funding sources of the NPO (e.g., Government, Private, Donations) */,
  "annual_budget" TEXT /* Annual budget of the NPO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the NPO */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the NPO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_npo_registrations_npo_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("npo_type_id") REFERENCES npo_types ("npo_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_npo_registrations_npo_objective_id FOREIGN KEY ("npo_objective_id") REFERENCES npo_objectives ("objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "npo_types" (
  "npo_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NPO type */,
  "npo_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the NPO type (e.g., Social Services, Education) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the NPO type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the NPO type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the NPO type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the NPO type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("npo_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "npo_objectives" (
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each objective */,
  "objective_name" TEXT /* Name of the objective (e.g., Family services, Child welfare) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the objective */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the objective is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the objective was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the objective was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., NPO representative, government agency staff) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "npo_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "npo_name" TEXT /* Name of the NPO */,
  "npo_registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the NPO */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contact is the primary contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the contact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the contact was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_npo_contacts_npo_registration_number FOREIGN KEY ("npo_registration_number") REFERENCES npo_registrations ("registration_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "npo_name" TEXT /* Name of the NPO submitting the report */,
  "npo_registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the NPO */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Annual, Financial) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Submitted, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_npo_registration_number FOREIGN KEY ("npo_registration_number") REFERENCES npo_registrations ("registration_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the NPO */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the NPO registration (e.g., Registered, Suspended, Canceled) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User who made the status change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the status change was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the status change was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_status_registration_number FOREIGN KEY ("registration_number") REFERENCES npo_registrations ("registration_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_status_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "npo_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "npo_name" TEXT /* Name of the NPO */,
  "npo_registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the NPO */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document (e.g., constitution, annual report) */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., Constitution, Annual Report) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_npo_documents_npo_registration_number FOREIGN KEY ("npo_registration_number") REFERENCES npo_registrations ("registration_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the NPO */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., registration update, report submission) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the audit trail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the audit trail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_registration_number FOREIGN KEY ("registration_number") REFERENCES npo_registrations ("registration_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "npo_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of NPO (e.g., Social Services, Education) */,
  "npo_registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the NPO */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the NPO was registered */,
  "report_submission_date" TEXT /* Date the NPO last submitted a report */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the NPO (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the statistical record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the statistical record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_npo_registration_number FOREIGN KEY ("npo_registration_number") REFERENCES npo_registrations ("registration_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_npo_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("npo_type_id") REFERENCES npo_types ("npo_type_id")
)
